mapper.sql: uprId, userId, sysUserId, storeId, oldValidityDate, newValidityDate, createdDate
mapper.insert:
insert into user_update_record
uprId,
userId,
sysUserId,
storeId,
oldValidityDate,
newValidityDate,
createdDate,
#{uprId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{sysUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{oldValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{newValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update user_update_record
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sysUserId = #{sysUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
oldValidityDate = #{oldValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
newValidityDate = #{newValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where uprId = #{uprId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update user_update_record set userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, oldValidityDate = #{oldValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, newValidityDate = #{newValidityDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where uprId = #{uprId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
